meta.reportType: A股多次涨停概率分析报告
meta.disclaimer: 本报告基于公开信息整合分析，数据为示例性质，不构成投资建议。股市有风险，投资需谨慎。

report_date.notes: 该周无国家法定节假日，A股正常开市5天

marketBreadth.assessment: 结构性行情为主，量能适中，板块轮动特征明显

market_overview.marketSentiment: 中性偏乐观，结构性机会突出
keyCatalysts: 地方两会密集召开，政策预期升温
春节消费旺季临近，消费复苏预期
年报业绩预告披露期，业绩驱动显现
美联储货币政策预期边际改善
riskFactors: 量能未能有效放大至1.5万亿以上

scoring_framework.frameworkName: A-Share Multiple Limit-Up Probability Scoring Framework (MLUP)

scoringScale.interpretation: Probability-weighted composite score representing relative likelihood of achieving 2+ limit-ups within next week

scoringDimensions.weightRationale: Limit-up stocks often exhibit momentum persistence in A-shares due to retail investor herding behavior and algorithmic trend-following. Historical data suggests 60%+ of multi-limit-up stocks had prior limit-up within 5 days.
Concept-driven investing dominates A-share short-term movements. Policy catalysts and sector rotation create concentrated capital flows. 70%+ of multi-limit-up stocks are current hot theme leaders.

scoringDimensions.factorName: 流通性与筹码结构 (Float and Liquidity)
scoringDimensions.weightRationale: Smaller float enables easier price manipulation and retail speculation. Turnover rate indicates capital participation intensity. Combined float+turnover predicts sustained limit-up feasibility.
Hard catalysts provide narrative justification and media coverage. Earnings surprises and M&A are strongest catalysts, while contract wins provide medium-term support.
Retail sentiment drives A-share limit-up persistence. Social media heat and margin trading data reflect FOMO (fear of missing out) intensity.

scoringDimensions.factorName: 季节性与日历效应 (Historical Seasonality)
scoringDimensions.weightRationale: A-shares exhibit calendar effects: pre-holiday speculation, conference seasonality, and end-of-quarter effects. Lower weight due to secondary importance vs momentum.

scoring_framework.calculationMethod: Weighted sum of normalized factor scores

specialAdjustments.note: ST stocks have 5% limit, making consecutive limits more achievable
IPO stocks have special trading rules for first 5 days

highProbability.label: 高概率 (Tier 1)
highProbability.estimatedOccurrenceRate: 25-35% of stocks in this tier achieve 2+ limit-ups within 5 days

mediumProbability.label: 中等概率 (Tier 2)
mediumProbability.estimatedOccurrenceRate: 8-15% of stocks in this tier achieve 2+ limit-ups within 5 days
typicalCharacteristics: Moderate momentum (1 recent limit-up or strong uptrend)

lowProbability.label: 低概率 (Tier 3)
lowProbability.estimatedOccurrenceRate: <5% of stocks in this tier achieve 2+ limit-ups within 5 days

tier1_highProbability.name: 龙头股份
tier1_highProbability.theme: 上海国企改革+跨境电商
tier1_highProbability.coreLogic: 上海国资改革政策催化，叠加跨境电商业务拓展预期，资金连续追捧。技术形态突破，量价配合良好。
riskFactors: 连续涨停后监管关注风险
tier1_highProbability.capitalFlow: 主力资金持续净流入，龙虎榜显示游资接力活跃

tier1_highProbability.name: 深中华A
tier1_highProbability.coreLogic: 锂电池产业链热度延续，叠加黄金避险属性，市场合力打造高度板。连续涨停显示资金共识强。
riskFactors: 换手率偏低流动性风险
tier1_highProbability.capitalFlow: 顶级游资介入，龙虎榜席位溢价明显，散户跟风盘充足

tier1_highProbability.name: 大连圣亚
tier1_highProbability.coreLogic: 东北冰雪旅游持续火爆，春节旺季预期强化，游资接力推动。冰雪经济政策持续发酵。
riskFactors: 事件驱动持续性待验证
tier1_highProbability.capitalFlow: 游资主导，机构参与度低，资金博弈特征明显

tier1_highProbability.name: 中兴商业
tier1_highProbability.coreLogic: 消费复苏预期+东北旅游热度外溢，零售板块估值修复。换手充分，筹码结构健康。
tier1_highProbability.capitalFlow: 多空分歧较大但承接有力，游资与散户共同参与

tier1_highProbability.name: 华建集团
tier1_highProbability.coreLogic: 城市更新政策推进，上海设计院龙头受益于本地建设提速。上海国企改革主题核心标的。
tier1_highProbability.capitalFlow: 机构与游资共同关注，资金流入稳定

tier2_mediumProbability.name: 华立股份
tier2_mediumProbability.coreLogic: 华为鸿蒙生态持续发酵，智能家居业务增长预期明确。主题投资热度中等。
tier2_mediumProbability.capitalFlow: 游资参与为主，资金关注度适中

tier2_mediumProbability.name: 高斯贝尔
tier2_mediumProbability.coreLogic: 卫星互联网政策利好，数字经济建设加速，技术面突破引发资金关注。
tier2_mediumProbability.capitalFlow: 短期资金博弈，持续性存疑

tier2_mediumProbability.name: 江苏华辰
tier2_mediumProbability.coreLogic: 特高压建设加速，电网投资增长确定性高，机构与游资共振。
tier2_mediumProbability.capitalFlow: 机构资金配置，游资参与接力

tier2_mediumProbability.name: 建元信托
tier2_mediumProbability.coreLogic: 信托行业转型预期改善，上海金融国企改革升温。大市值标的连板难度大。
tier2_mediumProbability.capitalFlow: 机构资金为主，流动性一般

tier2_mediumProbability.name: 公元股份
tier2_mediumProbability.coreLogic: 光伏产业链价格企稳反弹预期，水利基建政策加码。双主题驱动但非核心标的。
tier2_mediumProbability.capitalFlow: 资金关注度一般，跟随板块波动

tier2_mediumProbability.name: 尚纬股份
tier2_mediumProbability.coreLogic: 核电审批加速，特高压电缆需求增长，业绩弹性可期。
tier2_mediumProbability.capitalFlow: 短线资金参与，机构配置度一般

tier2_mediumProbability.name: 泰尔股份
tier2_mediumProbability.coreLogic: 人形机器人产业趋势确立，锂电设备更新周期开启。双热点概念叠加。
tier2_mediumProbability.capitalFlow: 游资主导，换手率高显示分歧

tier2_mediumProbability.name: 中华企业
tier2_mediumProbability.coreLogic: 房地产融资政策放松，上海本地国企地产商受益明显。
tier2_mediumProbability.capitalFlow: 机构配置为主，游资参与度低

tier2_mediumProbability.name: 宏达新材
tier2_mediumProbability.coreLogic: 有机硅供需改善，量子通信技术突破消息面刺激。
tier2_mediumProbability.capitalFlow: 短线资金博弈，持续性存疑

tier3_lowProbability.name: 万方发展
tier3_lowProbability.coreLogic: 军工订单预期+农业一号文件预热，双主业催化但逻辑不够聚焦。
tier3_lowProbability.capitalFlow: 资金分歧加大，跟风盘减少

tier3_lowProbability.name: 深粮控股
tier3_lowProbability.coreLogic: 粮食安全战略地位提升，深圳国资整合预期。防御性板块，涨停持续性弱。
tier3_lowProbability.capitalFlow: 资金关注度一般，缺乏游资参与

tier3_lowProbability.name: 吉翔股份
tier3_lowProbability.coreLogic: 锂盐价格触底反弹预期，影视业务复苏双击。但非锂业龙头，影视业务占比低。
tier3_lowProbability.capitalFlow: 跟风资金为主，缺乏主力介入

tier3_lowProbability.name: 华金资本
tier3_lowProbability.coreLogic: 北交所活跃度提升利好创投退出，珠海国企改革深化。创投概念边缘标的。
tier3_lowProbability.capitalFlow: 游资短期博弈，缺乏持续资金

tier3_lowProbability.name: 盛通股份
tier3_lowProbability.coreLogic: 素质教育政策回暖，机器人教育课程需求增长。概念较为边缘。
tier3_lowProbability.capitalFlow: 资金关注度低，跟风上涨

tier3_lowProbability.name: 深南电A
tier3_lowProbability.coreLogic: 电力市场化改革推进，储能调峰需求提升估值。电力板块弹性不足。
tier3_lowProbability.capitalFlow: 机构防御配置，游资不参与

validation.dataQuality: 上游文件存在，部分数据为基于市场逻辑的示例/估算值

modelLimitations: Past performance does not guarantee future results
Black swan events (regulatory changes, market crashes) can override all signals
High-frequency traders and algorithms may arbitrage away patterns
Surveillance and trading halts by exchanges can interrupt momentum
executionRisks: Limit-up stocks may open limit-up with no liquidity (一字涨停)
Gap-down risk on following day (open limit-down) is significant
T+1 trading rule prevents same-day exit
regulatoryRisks: 交易所重点监控 (exchange surveillance) may trigger trading restrictions
停牌核查 (trading halt for investigation) common after 3 consecutive limit-ups
Window guidance to brokerages may limit buying
riskDisclosure.dataDisclaimer: 本报告数据为基于公开信息的整合分析，部分数据为示例性质，非实时行情。实际投资需结合实时数据验证。
